title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks fail
summary_full: Trump said the U.S. blockade will stop Iran from policing the strait and benefiting economically while the rest of the world suffers from its closure.
summary_public: Trump said the U.S. blockade will stop Iran from policing the strait and benefiting economically while the rest of the world suffers from its closure.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: blockade will stop Iran from policing the strait
